summary: Iteration 98 - Document Bundle Detection and Transaction Grouping testing complete. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. All bundle endpoints functional: POST /api/document-intelligence/detect-bundles (scans docs, groups by PO/invoice/entity/vendor), GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles (list with filters), GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles/{bundle_id} (full detail with member_documents, suggested_next_action), PATCH /api/document-intelligence/bundles/{bundle_id} (reclassify, add/remove docs, status changes), GET /api/document-intelligence/bundle-review-queue (incomplete/needs_review bundles). Frontend: Document Bundles page at /document-bundles with summary cards (Total/Needs Review/Insufficient/Complete), filters (status/type/completeness), bundles table, and detail drawer with member docs, detected keys, notes, manual controls. DocumentIntelligencePanel shows bundle membership section when document belongs to bundle. All iteration_97 regression tests pass.

issues: Minor React hydration warning - <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic only, no functional impact
Document preview shows HTTP 404 for test documents without actual files (expected for test data)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles returns total, bundles array, status_counts, completeness_counts
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles?bundle_status=grouped filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles?bundle_type=customer_order_packet filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles?completeness_status=complete filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles/{bundle_id} returns full detail with member_documents, detected_keys, suggested_next_action
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles/{bundle_id} returns 404 for non-existent bundle
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/detect-bundles scans recent docs and returns bundles_detected, bundles, documents_scanned
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/detect-bundles with document_ids parameter works
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/detect-bundles with days_back parameter works
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/bundles/{bundle_id} can reclassify bundle_type
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/bundles/{bundle_id} can change bundle_status
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/bundles/{bundle_id} can update notes
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/bundles/{bundle_id} returns 404 for non-existent bundle
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/bundle-review-queue returns bundles needing review with suggested_next_action
Backend: Bundle completeness_status is complete/partial/insufficient with missing_expected_documents array
Backend: Document intelligence results enriched with bundle_id, bundle_type, bundle_status when in bundle
Backend: Regression - POST /api/document-intelligence/process/{id} still works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/document-intelligence/review-queue still works
Backend: Regression - POST /api/document-intelligence/match-transactions/{id} still works
Backend: Regression - POST /api/document-intelligence/resolve-entities/{id} still works
Backend: Regression - POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} still works
Backend: Regression - POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-link/{id} still works
Backend: Bundle grouping_basis and grouping_confidence correctly set (PO match = 0.95)
Backend: Bundle update creates activity events
Frontend: Document Bundles page loads at /document-bundles with summary cards
Frontend: Status/Type/Completeness filters work correctly
Frontend: Bundles table shows bundle_id, type, status, completeness, docs count, missing, updated date
Frontend: Bundle detail drawer opens on row click
Frontend: Detail drawer shows bundle type with edit button
Frontend: Detail drawer shows member documents with type badges and automation readiness
Frontend: Detail drawer shows detected keys (po_number, vendor, amount, invoice_number)
Frontend: Detail drawer shows notes input and Save Notes button
Frontend: Detail drawer shows Add document input and button
Frontend: Detail drawer shows Mark Complete button for complete bundles
Frontend: Nav item 'Doc Bundles' links to /document-bundles
Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel has bundle-membership-section with bundle info, related docs, missing docs
critical_code_review_comments: Backend service /app/backend/services/document_bundle_service.py well-structured with layered grouping strategy (PO 0.95 → invoice 0.92 → entity 0.88 → vendor+amount 0.65)
Backend: Completeness rules correctly implemented per bundle type (ap_packet needs invoice primary, customer_order_packet needs Sales_PO, etc.)
Backend: Document enrichment correctly adds bundle_id, bundle_type, bundle_status, bundle_completeness_status, related_document_count to intelligence results
Backend router: Bundle endpoints correctly placed BEFORE catch-all /{doc_id} to avoid route conflicts
Frontend DocumentBundleReviewPage.js has proper data-testids for testing (document-bundles-page, bundles-table, bundle-row-*, bundle-detail-drawer)
Frontend DocumentIntelligencePanel.js correctly fetches and displays bundle info when document has bundle_id

seed_data_existing.test_bundle: BDL-B739B77E with TEST-BUNDLE-A and TEST-BUNDLE-B (shared PO-9999-SHARED)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 98 - Document Bundle Detection and Grouping fully tested. New endpoints: POST /api/document-intelligence/detect-bundles (scans docs, creates bundles), GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles (list with filters), GET /api/document-intelligence/bundles/{bundle_id} (detail with member_documents, suggested_next_action), PATCH /api/document-intelligence/bundles/{bundle_id} (reclassify, add/remove docs), GET /api/document-intelligence/bundle-review-queue. Bundle types: customer_order_packet, purchasing_packet, ap_packet, warehouse_packet, unknown. Bundle statuses: grouped, needs_review, complete, incomplete. Completeness statuses: complete, partial, insufficient. Grouping confidence: PO 0.95, invoice 0.92, entity 0.88, vendor+amount 0.65. Document enrichment: bundle_id, bundle_type, bundle_status, bundle_completeness_status, related_document_count added to intelligence results. Activity events: bundle_detected, added_to_bundle, bundle_completeness_changed, bundle_manually_corrected. Key data-testids: document-bundles-page, bundle-summary-cards, bundles-table, bundle-row-{id}, bundle-detail-drawer, member-documents, missing-documents, edit-type-btn, save-notes-btn, add-doc-input, add-doc-btn, bundle-membership-section, copy-bundle-id-btn. Test bundle BDL-B739B77E exists with docs TEST-BUNDLE-A and TEST-BUNDLE-B sharing PO-9999-SHARED.

features: Bundles table with row click to detail
Detail drawer with member docs, detected keys, manual controls
Shows bundle_id, type, status when document belongs to bundle

mocked_apis_note: Business Central API operates in DEMO_MODE. Email Service is MOCKED (in-memory). SharePoint storage is MOCKED. Gemini AI used for real document processing but tests seed data directly in MongoDB.
